title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 476.1306 - Removal of information upon written privacy request, requirements
text:
476.1306.  Removal of information upon written privacy request, requirements. — 1.  After a person, business, or association has received a written request to protect the privacy of the court-related officer's personal information, that person, business, or association shall have five business days to remove the personal information from the internet.
  2.  After a person, business, or association has received a written request to protect the privacy of the court-related officer's personal information, that person, business, or association shall ensure that the court-related officer's personal information is not made available on any website or subsidiary website controlled by that person, business, or association.
  3.  After receiving a written request to protect the privacy of the court-related officer's personal information, no person, business, or association shall make available the court-related officer's personal information to any other person, business, or association through any medium.
(L. 2023 S.B. 103, A.L. 2025 H.B. 145 & 59 merged with S.B. 218)
